title: MikroTik wAPR-2nD&EC200A-EU wAP LTE Kit 2024
description: A new revision of the successful wAP LTE Kit model. It is a small access point in an outdoor design with the option of placing it indoors using the stand included in the package. Inside we find a built-in miniPCI-e LTE card EC200A-EU which supports 2G, 3G and 4G (LTE) networks. Furthermore, the wAP is also equipped with a built-in 4 dBi GSM antenna for connecting to a mobile operator. There is a 2.4 GHz radio part with a transmission speed of up to 300 Mbps for connecting home devices, and you…
